features.subtitle: Tab bar buttons (Posts, Inbox, Me, Search, Settings) now respond to taps correctly.
features.title: Fixed tab bar

features.subtitle: Fetching new content while scrolling no longer jumps the scroll position.
features.title: Smooth scrolling

features.subtitle: Post text that was previously truncated with ellipsis now wraps and displays fully.
features.title: Fixed text truncation

features.subtitle: Resolved a race condition that could cause the entire app to appear blurred on launch.
features.title: Fixed startup blur

features.subtitle: The 'Go to credentials settings' button and cross-tab navigation now work reliably.
features.title: Fixed navigation

features.subtitle: New credentials are now auto-selected and the home page updates immediately after setup.
features.title: Fixed credential setup

features.subtitle: Updated bundle ID, branding, and OAuth flow for the phubbard fork.
features.title: Forked and maintained
